name: The Hershey Company
description: The Hershey Company, commonly known as Hershey's, is an American multinational company and one of the largest chocolate manufacturers in the world. Headquartered in Hershey, Pennsylvania, the company manufactures chocolate, cookies, cakes, milkshakes, drinks, and other confectionery products. Founded by Milton S. Hershey in 1894 as the Hershey Chocolate Company, it has grown to encompass iconic brands such as Hershey's, Reese's, Kisses, Kit Kat, and Twizzlers, operating globally with products sold in over 60 countries.
